 {"id":"bd-212m.7.1","title":"Wish: stability + SSH session parity audit","description":"Audit Wish SSH session stability and parity with Go.

- Add stress tests for multiple concurrent SSH sessions (open/close, PTY resize).
- Add integration tests for TUI over SSH (smoke run).
- Fix any discrepancies or document limitations.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:

- Integration tests demonstrate stable multi-session handling.
- README limitation "Wish beta" updated based on evidence.","notes":"Files: crates/wish/src/*, legacy_wish for reference, tests/conformance or integration tests under tests/. +{"id":"bd-212m.7.2","title":"Wish: Windows SSH compatibility (CI + e2e)","description":"Validate Wish SSH compatibility on Windows by running wish SSH e2e tests on a Windows GitHub Actions runner.

Scope:
- Make wish e2e SSH client harness cross-platform (no hardcoded /dev/null; handle known-hosts and ssh_config paths).
- Avoid Unix-only password injection (askpass.sh) on Windows; either implement a Windows path or track password-auth coverage with follow-up beads.
- Ensure CI runs `cargo test -p charmed-wish --tests` on windows-latest and logs ssh client availability.
- Update README + FEATURE_PARITY once validated (or create follow-up beads for any remaining gaps).
","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:
- Windows SSH connection to Wish example succeeds and handles basic input/output.
- Any failures are documented with repro steps and filed as follow-up beads.
- README limitations updated to reflect Windows SSH status.","notes":"Consider adding CI or a manual checklist for Windows testing. Use wish examples under crates/wish/examples.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"RusticDeer","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:53:24.010044628Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-10T02:39:13.860999560Z","closed_at":"2026-02-10T02:39:13.860930181Z","close_reason":"Cross-platform wish SSH e2e harness (no /dev/null), Windows CI ensures OpenSSH client, docs updated","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-212m.7.2","depends_on_id":"bd-212m.7","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:02Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"bd-212m.7.3","title":"Unicode handling parity audit","description":"Audit Unicode handling parity (width, grapheme clusters, emoji) across Lipgloss/Glamour/Bubbletea.

Scope:
- Identify Unicode edge cases in Go (combining marks, wide glyphs, emoji sequences).
- Add fixtures and unit tests to reproduce width/layout behavior.
- Validate rendering + alignment with unicode-width and adjust if needed.
- Document any remaining limitations.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:
- Tests cover combining marks, wide glyphs, and emoji in layout/rendering.
- Any discrepancies fixed or documented in README limitations.
- FEATURE_PARITY.md updated with Unicode audit results.","notes":"Files: crates/lipgloss/src/renderer.rs, crates/glamour/src/lib.rs, crates/bubbletea/src/program.rs (width/layout). Use tests/conformance fixtures for Unicode.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:53:30.603884152Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T18:07:10.976285894Z","closed_at":"2026-01-25T18:07:10.976265376Z","close_reason":"Added comprehensive Unicode parity tests to glamour and lipgloss. Tests cover: CJK (日本, 中文, 한글), emoji (🦀, 🎉), combining characters (e+acute), ZWJ, variation selectors, full-width Latin, half-width katakana. All tests pass, confirming unicode-width crate provides consistent Go-parity behavior.","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-212m.7.3","depends_on_id":"bd-212m.7","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:02Z","created_by":"import"}]}

@@ -59,6 +59,17 @@ jobs:
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
         uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
 
+      - name: Ensure OpenSSH client available (Windows)
+        if: runner.os == 'Windows'
+        shell: pwsh
+        run: |
+          if (-not (Get-Command ssh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) {
+            Write-Host "ssh not found; installing OpenSSH.Client..."
+            Add-WindowsCapability -Online -Name OpenSSH.Client~~~~0.0.1.0
+          }
+          ssh -V
+          if (Get-Command ssh-keygen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { ssh-keygen -h } else { Write-Host "ssh-keygen not found" }
+
       - name: Cache cargo registry and build
         uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@779680da715d629ac1d338a641029a2f4372abb5 # v2.8.2
         with:
